title: VABNEER Furniture Sliders for Hardwood Floors and Carpets, 16-Pack PTFE Teflon Gliders, Self-Adhesive Round Furniture Moving Pads for Chairs, Tables, Couches & Heavy Appliances (19mm)
features: 【PTFE Teflon Gliders for Effortless Moving】These Teflon furniture sliders are made of high-performance PTFE material with an extremely low friction coefficient. Our furniture gliders allow you to move most heavy furniture single-handedly, saving time and effort.

【Effectively Protect Floor Surfaces】Acting as a soft cushion between furniture and floor, these furniture sliders for wooden floors effectively prevent scratches, dents, and wear, providing comprehensive protection for your precious floors.

【Quiet Operation & Scratch Prevention】These gliders for furniture significantly reduce noise when moving items. Ideal for apartments and offices where quiet is essential, ensuring you won't disturb neighbors or family members.
【Precise Size Compatibility】Designed for round chair legs with a 19mm diameter. For optimal results, please measure your chair leg's diameter before purchasing to ensure a perfect and secure fit.

【Wide Compatibility for Furniture & Flooring】Perfect as furniture sliders for carpet, hardwood, laminate, tile and other smooth surfaces. Suitable for wood, metal and plastic furniture including chairs, tables and cabinets. Also function as appliance sliders for heavy household appliances.
description: From the brand Previous page VABNEER Visit the store VABNEER In 2016, a simple but firm belief drove us to establish this Houseware brand: to give every household a better quality life. We understand that a home is not only a place to live, but also a place of warmth and love. We strive to create high-quality household products, always be the focus of attention to customers and provide exceptional products and services. Next page
